examples: The first title on next year's list is Fish-Man, a photo anthology by Maseru Tatsuki.
MASERU, capital of the tiny mountain kingdom of Lesotho, is hardly a nightlife hotspot.
The Caledon (or Mohokare) River flows adjacent to Maseru and forms a part of the border between Lesotho and South Africa.
Some 70 people were killed, and there was extensive looting and burning in Maseru, the capital.
Mashaba selected a squad of local players to play Lesotho in Maseru on 8 October.
